families.name: proliferation_minus_renal_lineage
families.rationale: Metastatic clones often upregulate proliferation while dedifferentiating from renal/HIF-2α lineage identity, producing a contrast between cycling and lineage programs.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if perm_p > 0.05 or delta_baseline < 0.05 against the MKI67=0.645 single-gene ceiling.

families.name: EMT_invasion_vs_tubule_identity
families.rationale: M1 lesions should show elevated invasion/EMT markers alongside loss of proximal tubule identity, a directional contrast independent of HIF state.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if delta_confound < 0.03 after adjusting for age/batch or if decoy_p > 0.05 suggesting the signal is shared with random gene pairs.

families.name: glycolysis_commitment_balance
families.rationale: A shift toward lactate-producing glycolysis (LDHA high, LDHB low, PDK1 blocking OXPHOS) is a candidate mechanism for metastatic metabolic rewiring.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if ci_lower < 0.6 or if the contrast collapses to a single-gene effect (delta_baseline < 0.05 vs best component).

families.name: hypoxia_stress_vs_vascular_response
families.rationale: Metastatic progression may decouple intracellular hypoxic stress response from angiogenic output, a balance not captured by any single HIF target.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if perm_p > 0.05 on TCGA or if replay on GSE40435/GSE53757 fails to reproduce sign.

families.name: housekeeping_negative_control
families.rationale: Housekeeping gene contrast with no mechanistic link to metastasis; expected to be near-null and serve as ex-ante negative control.
families.skeptic_test: Should fail with perm_p > 0.05 and delta_baseline < 0.05; if it passes, the pipeline has a normalization or leakage artifact.
